thought_beat_text: The cardboard seams are visible again—he can see the edges of the stage now, the light catching them—and the mission's urgency presses against this sudden clarity: everything real and everything false are happening at once, and he's still supposed to choose which one to save.
residue_summary: The honesty he cannot speak has become the only thing he can see—the artifice and the stakes are both visible now, and the timer doesn't care which is which.
image_hint: spotlight catching the edge of a painted wall, revealing its depth and flatness simultaneously
audio_hint: ticking underneath a held note, both growing louder at the same rate
